item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin API. Requires JWT (Bearer token). User must have admin role. Endpoints: login, orders (CRUD, filter by status/user_id, paginated), products (CRUD, paginated), users (CRUD, paginated). Set {{admin_url_v1}} (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin). Use Admin > Auth > Login to obtain admin_token.

item.name: Client
item.description: Client API. Requires JWT (Bearer token). Endpoints: auth (register, login, me), orders (CRUD, list paginated with status filter), products (list paginated, show), checkout, payments (process, list). Set {{client_url_v1}} (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1/client). Use Client > Auth > Login or Register to obtain client_token.
